addi sp, sp, 0x700
addi a0, zero, 0x120
jal ra, strlen
addi s0, a0, 0
addi a0, zero, 0x200
jal ra, strlen
addi s1, a0, 0
addi a0, zero, 0x250
jal ra, strlen
addi s2, a0, 0
eternal: beq zero,zero, eternal
strlen:
    addi   t0, zero, 0   
loop:
    add    t1, t0, a0
    lb     t1, 0(t1)
    beq    t1, zero, end
    addi   t0, t0, 1
    jal    zero,loop
end:                     
    addi   a0, t0, 0 
    jalr   zero, ra, 0



addi x2 x2 1792
addi x10 x0 288
jal x1 36
addi x8 x10 0
addi x10 x0 512
jal x1 24
addi x9 x10 0
addi x10 x0 592
jal x1 12
addi x18 x10 0	
beq x0 x0 0
addi x5 x0 0
add x6 x5 x10
lb x6 0(x6)
beq x6 x0 12	
addi x5 x5 1
jal x0 -16
addi x10 x5 0
jalr x0 x1 0
